BEHIND THE HUE
Subtle red undertones weave warmth, depth, and playful intensity through this gentle shade. Delicate, yet intriguingly complex.

DESIGNED FOR YOU
Inviting a splash of creative, playful charm into your day, Pink Salt is designed for life in motion, and for those who go with the flow: the wanderers, the romantics, and the curious.

EASY TO CARRY, HARD TO FORGET
Slim and space-saving, the memobottle's unique shape makes it easier than ever to carry water conveniently, ensuring hydration is always within reach.

YOUR FINAL CHANCE TO WIN THE TRIP OF A LIFETIME

Entries close 6 November, and you don't want to miss this one. You and your best friend could be jetting off to Japan on an $8,000 AUD adventure, complete with boutique stays, guided tours, and an ARRIVAL-hosted trip through Tokyo and Kyoto.

It only takes a minute to enter. Sign up, follow, tag, and describe your travel partner in 3 emojis.
